_comment: Phase 4.5 K=100 gate-calibration artefact. UNSEALED TEMPLATE: empty `gates` array means provisional KPI_GATES values remain in effect (loadCalibratedGates() returns null). The calibration runner (calibrate-gates.ts) overwrites this file in place with measured values. Per docs/PHASE_4_PLAN.md §4.5, calibration data is NOT committed in the runner-machinery PR — this stub ships so the schema is reviewed; real values arrive when the runner is executed against the frozen baseline.
